name: Potato-Leek Soup
recipeIngredient: 2 Leeks, white parts only, washed well and sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the potatoes, water, and leeks in a medium-sized soup pot.
2. Bring to a boil over high heat.
3. Reduce heat, cover, and simmer until the potatoes are tender, about 30 minutes.
4. Transfer half of the soup to a blender or food processor and blend until smooth and creamy.
5. Return the blended mixture to the pot.
6. Stir to mix thoroughly.
7. Add remaining ingredients (if using optional ones such as dill or scallions).
8. Heat through, stirring occasionally.
(If optional ingredients are used, cook over very low heat for an additional 10 minutes.)
